item.name: Horizon Crocodile
item.description:
This sizable reptile lurks in the deep waters of the caldera lakes, but will occasionally climb ashore to hunt.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: This species of crocodile is endemic to the Ut'ohmu Horizon. While it's not uncommon to spot one sunbathing on the shore, approach at your own peril.
